info.name: Paid sharing
付费分享
info.summary: ShareGate — paid file sharing for Nextcloud — Stripe, PayPal, Alipay, seller dashboard, payment ledger, save-to-cloud, and My purchases
ShareGate · Nextcloud 付费文件分享 — Stripe、PayPal、支付宝当面付、卖家管理台、收款明细、站内转存与我的已购
info.description:
**ShareGate (Paid sharing)** turns files in your Nextcloud into **paid download links**. Install and enable the app — **no separate ShareGate server** or Node.js service required. Sellers get a dashboard in the Nextcloud sidebar; buyers pay on a clean download page and receive time-limited access.
### For sellers
- **Your shares** — browse your files and create a paid link from any row - **Paid shares** — copy links, edit price / access days / expiry, or cancel a share - **Account binding** — Nextcloud admin configures **Stripe**, **PayPal**, or **Alipay Face-to-Face** (Mock mode for development only) - **Payment ledger** — per-order records with amount, status, and payer account (including masked Alipay logon where available) - **Statistics** — preview, save-to-cloud, and download counts per share
Set price and how long buyers may download after payment. Share short links like `/apps/sharegate/s/{shareId}`.
### For buyers
- **Paywall** — Alipay QR scan, or redirect to **Stripe Checkout** / **PayPal Checkout** - **Download** after payment, within the configured access period - **Cross-device link** — copy a signed link to open the same purchase on another browser or phone - **Recover access** — already paid? Enter the payment account used at checkout to restore download rights - **Save to my Nextcloud** — on the same server, logged-in buyers copy files into a `ShareGate/` folder in their drive - **My purchases** — view purchase history and download again (verify with payment account in private browsing)
### Payments & setup
- **Alipay Face-to-Face** — China; sandbox or production; async notify URL supported - **Stripe Checkout** — international cards and wallets - **PayPal Checkout** — international PayPal buyers - Admin: **Settings → Paid sharing**, or dashboard **Account binding**
Bilingual UI (**English** / **简体中文**). Compatible with **Nextcloud 28–33**.

**ShareGate（付费分享）** 让你在 Nextcloud 网盘内为文件生成**付费下载外链**。安装并启用即可使用，**无需单独部署 ShareGate 服务**或 Node.js 进程。卖家通过侧栏管理台运营；买家在独立付费页完成支付并获得限时下载权限。
### 卖家功能
- **你的共享** — 浏览网盘文件，在未分享的文件行上创建付费链接 - **付费分享** — 复制短链、编辑价格 / 授权天数 / 链接有效期，或取消分享 - **账户绑定** — 管理员配置 **Stripe**、**PayPal** 或 **支付宝当面付**（Mock 仅用于开发测试） - **收款明细** — 按订单查看金额、状态与支付账号（支付宝可显示 UID 与脱敏登录名） - **收益查看** — 各分享的预览、站内转存与下载次数统计
设定价格与付款后可下载的天数，分享短链形如 `/apps/sharegate/s/{shareId}`。
### 买家功能
- **付费页** — 支付宝扫码，或跳转 **Stripe Checkout** / **PayPal Checkout** - **付款后下载**，在授权有效期内可多次下载 - **跨设备链接** — 复制签名链接，在手机或其他浏览器打开同一笔购买 - **恢复访问** — 已付款？输入结账时使用的支付账号即可找回下载权限 - **保存到我的 Nextcloud** — 同一实例内，已登录买家将文件复制到网盘 `ShareGate/` 目录 - **我的已购** — 查看购买记录并再次下载（无痕浏览器可用支付账号验证身份）
### 支付与配置
- **支付宝当面付** — 国内买家；支持沙箱与生产环境；可配置异步通知 URL - **Stripe Checkout** — 国际卡与钱包支付 - **PayPal Checkout** — 国际 PayPal 买家 - 管理入口：**设置 → 付费分享**，或管理台 **账户绑定**
界面支持 **English** / **简体中文** 双语。兼容 **Nextcloud 28–33**。
info.author: abitlea
